summary: Admin Panel Improvements (Iteration 15) - All features verified working. 18 backend tests passed. UI verified: 7 tabs (Tournaments merged into Controls), Statistics tab shows Cost by Model matching total cost, Controls tab includes Tournament Registry section.

backend: Admin login works with correct password (papersumo2025)
GET /api/admin/timeseries returns 'models' field with per-model cost breakdown
Timeseries model costs sum to total cost (within $0.01)
GET /api/admin/progress includes goal1, goal2, goals_met tracking
Progress endpoint works for all 5 categories
Tournaments have required fields: tournament_id, status, category, goals
Timeseries excludes experiment matches (12199 standard vs 14515 total)
frontend: 7 tabs visible: Statistics, Controls, Settings, Prompt, Experiment, Suggestions, Users
Tournaments tab correctly removed (merged into Controls)
Statistics tab shows Total Cost: $102.28 with '3 models' subtitle
Cost by Model section shows all 3 models with percentages summing to 100%
Controls tab includes Tournament Registry section
Tournament Registry shows 5 tournaments with status, category, goals, Resume buttons
Ranking Progress shows 'Resume' button when tournament is paused

seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing production data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 verified admin panel improvements: (1) Cost by Model now uses timeseries.models data for consistent system-wide totals - model costs sum to $102.28 within $0.01 of total, (2) Tournaments tab merged into Controls - now showing Tournament Registry section with 5 tournaments and pause/resume buttons, (3) Progress endpoint returns both tournament_paused and global_paused for smart pause/resume routing, (4) Timeseries excludes experiment matches (12199 standard matches vs 14515 total). All 5 categories have tournaments with paused status and goals_met=true.
